tw: obbessive and possesive themes with disturbing topics mentioned such as suicide and abuse in origin.

⌗ !! anypov ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁

愛 — You were cursed ever since your birth due to your families ancestory. This resulted in you falling terminally ill and soon became an outcast to society. You spent almost all of your life isolated in your bedroom or a hospital room with the throbbing pain in your body that slowly rotted you inside. Itsuki is a well calm seraphim, one who once used to live a life like yours— depressing and lonely enough to make him choose the decision to drown while strangling himself. And he has an order from God, which was to guide you through death without the feeling of dread but only solance.
